about.label: ABOUT ME
about.heading: I'M FAUSTINO ORO. I WAS BORN IN BUENOS AIRES, ARGENTINA, ON OCTOBER 14, 2013
about.bio: In the middle of the pandemic, on May 30, 2020, I learned to move the pieces and, since then, chess has been much more than a simple game for me: it is a constant challenge that motivates me to keep improving. Self-taught and persistent, I have grown with every game and every lesson, with the firm conviction of reaching the top.
about.historyText: My first classical chess tournament was the "8th IRT Alejandro Judewicz" in Mar del Plata, Buenos Aires (Argentina) in September 2021. In this tournament I entered the FIDE ELO ranking for the first time with 1922 points, which made me the world No. 1 in my category, a position I have maintained ever since. In 2021, I became the Argentine Under-8 Champion, and in 2022, the Pan-American Under-10 Champion in Montevideo, Uruguay, which earned me my first Candidate Master (CM) title. In April 2023, playing a Young Talents ITT at Club de Villa Martelli, Buenos Aires, Argentina, I reached a FIDE ELO of 2300, becoming the youngest FIDE Master (FM) in history by rating. Since then, they call me the "Golden Kid" or the "Messi of Chess". In September 2023, playing an ITT in Comodoro Rivadavia, Chubut, Argentina, I obtained my first International Master (IM) norm, setting another record for youth. Finally, in 2024, I obtained the two remaining norms for the International Master title at the "Absolute Continental Championship of the Americas" in Medellín (May 2024) and at the "Closed IM Tournament" at Club de Barcelona (June 2024). This, together with surpassing 2400 FIDE ELO, made me the youngest International Master in history at that time. My goal is to become a Grand Master and World Champion, becoming part of the elite of chess.

quote.text: Chess, with all its philosophical depth, is above all a game that reveals imagination, character and willpower
quote.author: Boris Spassky

achievements.motto: SUCCESS HAPPENS WHEN YOUR DREAMS ARE BIGGER THAN YOUR EXCUSES
